pages.text: A metal so dense it generates its own microscopic gravity wells. Forged from raw neutrion blasted in ultra-high temperature furnaces. $(4)CRITICAL$() for advanced pyramid construction!

pages.title: Pyramid Tier 2+
pages.text: $(5)Neutrion Blocks$() are required for $(l:patchouli:machines/pyramid_core)Pyramid Tier 2 and 3$() structures! While Tier 1 uses cheap $(gold)Gold Blocks$(), higher tiers require the denser $(5)Neutrion$() for the base layer.
